name: Live Crawl And Browser Smoke Evidence

redirectFailures: https://www.mitra-auto.fi/shop returned HTTP 200 instead of redirecting to /catalog.
https://www.mitra-auto.fi/services returned HTTP 200 instead of redirecting to /en/services.
https://www.mitra-auto.fi/tire-hotel returned HTTP 200 instead of redirecting to /en/services/tire-hotel.
https://www.mitra-auto.fi/helsinki/autohuolto returned HTTP 200 instead of redirecting to /palvelut/autohuolto.
https://www.mitra-auto.fi/palvelut/dpf-pesu returned HTTP 200 instead of redirecting to /palvelut/dpf-huolto.

productMigrationFailure.expected: Permanent redirect to human-readable slug URL

httpCrawlSummary.rawHtmlFinding: Sampled direct HTML responses have generic pre-hydration title/description, no canonical, and H1 text indicating JavaScript is required. Browser hydration fixes many indexable page heads, but raw HTML remains weak for search and crawler resilience.

passedSamples.result: Rendered Finnish homepage with route-specific title, H1, canonical, index/follow, service/catalog/contact actions.
Rendered Finnish service page with H1, canonical, index/follow, price/process/service sections, and booking actions.
Rendered product detail with product title, canonical, index/follow, stock, delivery, price text, and add-to-cart control.
Rendered English mobile service page with English lang, H1, canonical, index/follow, and booking actions.
Rendered English contact page with H1, canonical, index/follow, address, phone, and email.

reversibleActions.action: Open booking modal from service page
reversibleActions.result: Booking step 1 modal opened with license plate and date fields; no booking submitted.
Cart opened with product item and checkout action; no payment or order submitted.
Checkout form rendered; no customer data entered and no payment submitted.

browserFindings.finding: Public unauthenticated CMS control center rendered in browser. Sanitized pattern counts observed: phone-like=14, plate-like=8, email-like=1. Raw personal data was intentionally not copied to artifacts.
Checkout content rendered while the browser URL remained on the product detail path; title became generic, canonical disappeared, and robots changed to noindex,nofollow.

blockers: Public /cms exposes an unauthenticated CMS control center with apparent private customer/vehicle/contact records.
Production product sitemap and Merchant feed URLs serve HTML instead of XML.
Legacy route redirects are not deployed on www host.
Opaque product identifier URL does not redirect to the human-readable slug URL.
Invalid routes and accidental route variants are soft-404s at HTTP 200.
Checkout start can render checkout content on a product URL after cart action.
cleanup: Removed E-3 Playwright snapshot and console files generated from 2026-06-22T15:23 through 2026-06-22T15:27 because they could contain rendered private route evidence.
Trimmed E-3 websocket noise appended to the pre-existing .playwright-mcp/console-2026-06-22T14-39-17-906Z.log file.
nextTask: E-4 - Drift Baseline And Monitoring Handoff
